title: スプリングSの後に・バクシン成長

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Uwaaah?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I've l-lost... lost... lost!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Did I just... lose?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It can't be?! But... I'm the talented class
representative?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: NOOOO! That just can't be!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: B-but this is reality. I have lost...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Perhaps the truth is...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: That I'm not talented?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps it's true! I can't run long distances, just
like everyone says! No, no, no! There's simply no
way, I... the... the class representative...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
W-wait, does that make me... no longer class
representative?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
If I can't be looked up to by the people, then I
can't fulfill my role as class representative...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No, anything but that! If I'm not class
representative, then I have nothing left!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Then who am I?! Wellhellotherehowdoyoudo?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Are you Sakura Bakushin O?! An Umamusume
soon to be class representative?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
...Come down?! You tell me I should come down
in rank?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Breath in...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: ...and out.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, the air here is delicious... even though we are
underground.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's finally calmed down, but the shock of losing
is still hitting hard. If that's the case...
choice_data_list: This is just a step in the process.
This is just a step in the process.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: A step in the process...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: That's true! I've still got a long way to go!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
This doesn't mean I've failed. I just need more
practice!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, for a second I forgot how wonderful of an
Umamusume I am. Silly me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...It's good that she bounces back so quickly.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I will pull myself together! So please, tell
me what to do!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I believe that the objectively best measure here
would be to follow your advice.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No matter the situation, I am a perfect, honest,
and well-behaved class representative!
choice_data_list:
Let's go back to the basics! Starting off with
sprinting!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Yes!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wait, sprinting?!
choice_data_list: What you need right now is more speed!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh, now that I think about it, you're right!
choice_data_list: Next up is the Aoi Stakes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We'll be dropping a grade, but if there's a race
she can definitely win, it's a 1,200-meter race.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I understand. I will give it my all!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I will restore my hurt pride as class representative!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, it's settled. The next race will be the Aoi
Stakes!
